description:
An open-source ebook reader designed for immersive and deep reading experiences.

Readest is a modern, feature-rich ebook reader designed for avid readers offering seamless cross-platform access, powerful tools, and an intuitive interface to elevate your reading experience.
Release Highlight
- Select All in Library: You can now select all books at once when in selection mode
- More Translation Options: Added support for Azure and Google Translate services
- Dark Mode Enhancement: New option to invert image colors for better visibility in dark mode
- Bilingual TTS: Enjoy bilingual text-to-speech for books with content in two languages
- Full Book Translation: Translate books in any language into bilingual ebooks
- Privacy Settings: Added a new option to opt-out of telemetry
What's Changed
- fix: reimporting books will update the import time, being consistent with update time, closes #1200 by @chrox in https://github.com/readest/readest/pull/1203
- layout: grouping modal now should stay on top of the header bar by @chrox in https://github.com/readest/readest/pull/1207
- css: don't override body background, closes #1206 by @chrox in https://github.com/readest/readest/pull/1208
- feat: add select all button in select mode, closes #1202 by @chrox in https://github.com/readest/readest/pull/1209
- fix: normalize input text by removing newlines to prevent translation glitches by @chrox in https://github.com/readest/readest/pull/1210
- feat: add azure and google translator providers, closes #1135 and closes #1215 by @chrox in https://github.com/readest/readest/pull/1218
- layout: align text end for select labels on safari by @chrox in https://github.com/readest/readest/pull/1219
- fix: add location only when toc item is at the same level as the section by @chrox in https://github.com/readest/readest/pull/1220
- css: unset link color in footnotes in dark mode for safari by @chrox in https://github.com/readest/readest/pull/1221
- doc: update screenshots by @chrox in https://github.com/readest/readest/pull/1222
- feat: add an option to invert image color in dark mode by @chrox in https://github.com/readest/readest/pull/1223
- fix: transient navigation bar should work now for Android 8-15, closes #1199 by @chrox in https://github.com/readest/readest/pull/1225
- fix: reorder icons in the ico file for Windows, closes #1175 by @chrox in https://github.com/readest/readest/pull/1227
- fix: use external browsers to open links in epub file, closes #1211 by @chrox in https://github.com/readest/readest/pull/1228
- feat: add bilingual TTS support for bilingual books, closes #1226 by @chrox in https://github.com/readest/readest/pull/1230
- tts: always infer language code from script in bilingual TTS by @chrox in https://github.com/readest/readest/pull/1233
- layout: display full publisher field in book details, closes #1224 by @chrox in https://github.com/readest/readest/pull/1234
- feat: add an option to opt-out telemetry by @chrox in https://github.com/readest/readest/pull/1236
- fix: select filtered books when activating select all by @chrox in https://github.com/readest/readest/pull/1237
- layout: overlay the footer of the translator popup and less sensitive page flip with mouse wheel by @chrox in https://github.com/readest/readest/pull/1238
- feat: support full book translation to bilingual books, closes #398 by @chrox in https://github.com/readest/readest/pull/1240
- fix: skip speech when the text is empty at the end of some chapters, closes #1231 by @chrox in https://github.com/readest/readest/pull/1243
- fix: use updated library when dropfile to import on web browser by @chrox in https://github.com/readest/readest/pull/1244
- translator: post-process translated text for punctuation spacing by @chrox in https://github.com/readest/readest/pull/1245
- layout: better organized panels in settings dialog by @chrox in https://github.com/readest/readest/pull/1246
- release: version 0.9.49 by @chrox in https://github.com/readest/readest/pull/1247
Full Changelog: https://github.com/readest/readest/compare/v0.9.43...v0.9.49
